violations.text: The hand wash sink in the bakery dish wash area is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Working containers of various dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Honeycomb packaged from an approved source are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment to obtain proper labels from distributor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Crates of ice cream pints were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Inspector observed two stand mixer whisks in poor repair, with tines missing. Whisks to be taken out of service until repaired or replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of several stand mixers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The front service area is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Handwashing sink in the mixing room is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding employees to wash their hands is required at all handwashing sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Containers of icing packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from self service area and placed behind counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Dry ingredient bins are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the storage area above the retail store, and in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Scoops for walnuts and cinnamon observed stored on unclean surfaces (tops of boxes) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Establishment is reusing single service loaf and cupcake pans. Single service items shall not be reused. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storeroom above retail store, bakery, hallway, and 3rd floor storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The lid on the cornmeal bin was observed not in good repair (cracked). Mixer whisks were observed not in good repair, with wires missing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the storage areas. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: utensil shelving ingredient bins receiving area shelves An accumulation of paper and adhesive was observed on numerous stacked buckets used for food preparation and storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The door to the toilet room above the retail store is not self-closing, with food containers stored outside of it. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The receptacle in the women's toilet room above the retail store is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The 3 bay sink in the dish pit is in poor repair, with water leaking into a bucket on the floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris:1. Light shield (above mixers)2. Ceiling (above mixers) 3. The air conditioner pipe above the door to the receiving areaThe physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Inspector observed a hole in the storage area above retail store. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in dry storage areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
